ead.archdesc:
======= RMM02874Greeley and Hansen, Engineers records2874Compiled by RMC StaffDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections
February 20122B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL:
physcplanThis finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:31:58 UTC.12/07/2018
This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor) >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Greeley and Hansen, Engineers records
Greeley and Hansen, Engineers
2874
4 cubic feet. 4 cubic feet.
1955-1968. Blueprints, printed material Consulting reports, reprints, and articles pertaining to water resources and sanitation projects written by Samuel A. Greeley, Paul Hansen, their staff, and others. Collection material in English 2068028
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
February 2012
EAD encoding:
RMC Staff, February 2012
Date modified:
RMC Staff, February 2012
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Consulting reports, reprints, and articles pertaining to water resources and sanitation projects written by Samuel A. Greeley, Paul Hansen, their staff, and others.
COLLECTION ARRANGEMENT
Series headings: consulting reports, published articles, pamphlets.Arranged chronologically within series.
Cite As:
Greeley and Hansen, Engineers records, #2874. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Water resources. Sanitary engineers. Sanitary engineering. Conservation of natural resources. Greeley, Samuel A., approximately 1883-1968. Hansen, Paul, 1920-1944.
2068028 <<<<<<< HEAD Link to a copy of the printed finding aid.Series I. Consulting Reports
Scope and Contents
Specifications and Instructions. Approx. 200 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H file number S-217.Sewage Disposal Project, Gambles Hill Road Pumping Station, Richmond, Virginia,1955-1011
Scope and Contents
Progress Report No. 2. Compiled with Charles A. Maguire and Elson T. Killam. Approx. 100 pp., text, tables, maps. G & H S-145.Objectives of Sewage Treatment and Facilities Required, Deer Island Sewage Treatment Plant, Boston, Massachusetts,1955-1012
Scope and Contents
Progress Report No. 2. Supplement No. 3. compiled with Charles A. MacGuire and Elson T. Killam. Approx. 40 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H S-145.Settling Tanks, Deer Island Sewage Treatment Plant, Boston, Massachusetts,1956-0813
Scope and Contents
Report to G & H, Charles A. Maguire and Elson I. Killam by Pi-Square Engineering Company, Boston. Approx. 40 pp., text, tables.Detailed Studies on Hydraulic Transients and Pump Controls, Deer Island Sewage Treatment Plant,1956-0414Report on Financing the Acquisition, Improvement, and Operation of the Woodlawn Water Company,1960-0715Report on Financing Water Works Improvements, Skokie, Illinois,1963-0416
Scope and Contents
Empresas Publicas De Medellin, Medellin Columbia. Approx. 200 pp., text, tables, figures. Written in English and Spanish. G & H S-186Reports on Proposed Sanitary Sewerage Project for Medellin, Columbia and Environs,1963-1217
Scope and Contents
"This report summarizes the results of our studies to determine the best procedures for improving the operation and increasing the capacity of the existing incinerating plant, and to estimate the effects on refuse collection and disposal costs of combining the collections of combustible and noncombustible refuse." Approx. 10 pp., text, some tables, three figures (floor plans, elevations and sections) not included in the copy. G & H G-259Report on Incinerating Plant, Whitefish Bay, Wisconsin,1963-1218Report on Refuse Disposal, Northeastern Milwaukee County, Wisconsin,1964-0119
Scope and Contents
Approx. 10 pp., text, and some tables. G & H M-254Project for the Expansion of Water Supply and Sewerage Facilities of Lima, Peru, Corporacion De Saneamiento De Lima,1964-01110
Scope and Contents
"…we have reviewed the existing refuse collection and disposal practices of the member municipalities in the North Suburban Council on Refuse Disposal, have determined the refuse quantities for which capacity should be provided now and in the future, and have developed alternate projects, including estimates of first and long range refuse disposal problem of the Council area." Communities include Deerfield, Des Plains, Glencoe, Glenview, Golf, Highland Park, Kenilworth, Mt. Prospect, Niles Northbrook, Northfield, Park Ridge, Skokie, Wilmette, Winnetka. Approx. 90 pp., text, tables, Maps. G & H G255.Report on Refuse Disposal, North Suburban Council on Refuse Disposal, Wilmette, Illinois,1964-02111
Scope and Contents
"This manual is a working guide. It sets forth in non-technical language the basic considerations in providing refuse service, the methods available, comparative, costs, sanitary code requirements, procedures to be followed, and offers practical suggestions for planning and carrying out a successful refuse collections and disposal project." Approx. 69 pp., text, tables, figures.Municipal Refuse Collections and Disposal, Office for Local Government, New York State,1964-09112
Scope and Contents
"A detailed, comprehensive study has been made of the charges to the five northeast Ramsey County suburban communities (Falcon Heights, Maplewood, North Saint Paul, Roseville, White Bear Lake)… This report sets forth pertinent data relative to the fairness of such charges, and recommends a method of computing rates for suburban sewage disposal service." Approx. 125 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H S-266Report on the Present Charges by Saint Paul for Sewage Disposal, Five Northeast Suburban Communities, Ramsey County, Minnesota,1964-07113
Scope and Contents
Approx.. 30 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H M-250.Report on Appraisal of Water Supply Facilities of Fairview Utility Company, Mount Prospect, Illinois1964-11114Notice to Bidders, Instructions to Bidders, Proposal, Bid Bond, Agreement, Performance Bond, Statutory Bond and Specification for 1962 Waterworks Improvements, Tulsa Oklahoma,1965-01115
Scope and Contents
Part 1 - Basic Data. Approx. 100 pp., Text, Tables, maps. Report written in Spanish and English. G & H S-254.Feasibility Study for Sewage Disposal, Institute Nacional De Planificacion, Lima Peru,1965-01116
Scope and Contents
Part 2, Project North Outfall; Part 3, Project South Outfall. Approx. 50 pp., text, tables, figures. Report written in Spanish and English. G & H S-254Feasibility Study for Sewage Disposal, Institute Nacional De Planificacion, Lima Peru,1965-09117
Scope and Contents
"The design incorporated in the Preliminary Plans provides for the elimination of all discharges of untreated and unchlorinated overflows from combined sewers into Hutchinson River, Eastchester Bay and the Upper East River east of Ferry Point Park by the construction of a system of new, relief and overflow outlet sewers and treatment plants at Boston Road, Conner Street, Bushnell Avenue and Throngs Neck Boulevard." Approx. 150 pp., text, tables figures. G & H S-237.Report on Preliminary Design, Vol. 1 - Report, Marginal Pollution Control Project, Eastchester Bay, Department of Public Works, New York City,1965-02118
Scope and Contents
This volume contains the preliminary plans and profiles of the proposed sewers and the preliminary outline plans for the four treatment plants. Approx. 150 pp., plans and figures. G & H S-237.Report on Preliminary Design, Vol. 2 - Plans, Marginal Pollution Control Project, Eastchester Bay, Department of Public Works, New York,1965-02119
Scope and Contents
Report compiled with Bannister Engineering Co., St. Paul. Approx. 200 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H S-275.Report on Sewerage and Sewerage Treatment, South St. Paul, Minnesota,1965-02120
Scope and Contents
"The new Lake View Pumping Station, a distribution system pumping station to be located on Wilson Avenue between Claredon Avenue and Marine Drive, will replace the existing Lake View Pumping Station… It will serve the most easterly area of the North Zone of the Chicago Water System." Approx. 180 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H W-235.Report on Design, Lake View Pumping Station, Department of Public Works, Chicago,1965-03121
Scope and Contents
"This report summarizes the studies made to establish a program of progressive construction which will be compatible with the over-all program of sewer construction proposed in the 1962 Report. (Report on Proposed West and Northwest Sewers, G & H, June 1962)." Approx. 25 pp., tables, text, maps. G & H S-142. (In a folder)Report of Sewerage for the Northwest Area, The Metropolitan Sanitary District of Greater Chicago,1965-07122
Scope and Contents
Approx. 20 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H S-142.Brief Report Prompted by a Proposal to Abandon the West Side Lagoons, The Metropolitan Sanitary District of Greater Chicago,1965-07123
Scope and Contents
Contains Notice to Bidders, Instructions to Bidders, Proposal, Agreement, Performance Bond and Specifications. Approx. 80 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H S-51.Comprehensive Sewer Project, Conversation of Trickling Filter Structure to Final Sedimentation Tank No. 5, The Greater Peoria Sanitary and Sewage Disposal District, Peoria County, Illinois,1965-08124
Scope and Contents
Approx. 15 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H S-284Report on Incinerating Plant, Roanoke, Virginia,1965-02125
Scope and Contents
Approx. 25 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H S-284.Study and Report on Methods of Sludge Disposal at North Side Sludge Disposal Plant, Houston, Texas,1965-09126Report on the Sanitary Sewer System, Glenview, Illinois,1966-01127
Scope and Contents
Approx. 40 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H G-169.Report on Refuse Disposal, Norfolk, Virginia,1966-03128
Scope and Contents
Approx. 20 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H S-77.Report on Proposed Aeration Facilities, Sanitary District of Rockford, Illinois,1966-02229
Scope and Contents
Approx. 30 pp., text, tables. G & H S-271.Review of Proposed Industrial Waste Charges, Kellogg Company, Battlecreek, Michigan1966-02230
Scope and Contents
Approx. 20 pp., text, tables. G & H S-293.Report on the Treatment and Disposal of Wastes from the S.B. Foot Tanning Company, Red Wing, Minnesota,1966-05231
Scope and Contents
Approx. 30 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H S-288.Report on Liquid Industrial Wastes from West Bend Company Plant, West Bend, Wisconsin,1966-05232
Scope and Contents
Notice to Bidders, Instructions to Bidders, Proposal, Agreement, Bond and Specifications. Approx. 20 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H S-77Sewage Treatment Plant Additions, Sanitary District of Rockford, Rockford, Illinois,1966-05233
Scope and Contents
Notice to Bidders, Instructions to Bidders, …Specifications. Approx. 250 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H W-244.Sewage Treatment Plant Additions, Sanitary District of Rockford, Rockford, Illinois,1966-08234
Scope and Contents
Specifications and instructions. Approx. 50 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H S-215.Sanitary Sewer Improvements, Glenview, Illinois,1966-07235
Scope and Contents
Prepared with Harza Engineers. "The water resources of the Western Region of New York State have been inventoried in this reconnaissance. Water needs and opportunities for development were identified and projected by decades to the year 2020. The cost of development of potential facilities were estimated and alternative ways of combining the facilities to meet the projected requirements were investigated." Approx.. 150 pp., text, tables, figures.Reconnaissance of Water Resources Potentials for Western New York Area, New York State Water Resources Commission,1966-08236
Scope and Contents
Prepared with Harza Engineers, Chicago. Report includes Appendices A-G. Approx. 250 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H W-244.Reconnaissance of Water Resources Potentials for West New York, New York State Water Resources Commission,1966-08237
Scope and Contents
Prepared with Harza Engineers, Chicago. Report includes Appendices H-Q. Approx. 150 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H W-244.Reconnaissance of Water Resources Potentials for Western New York Area, New York Water Resources Commission,1966-08238
Scope and Contents
The report presents the general provisions and detail specifications for the plant in Park Forest. Approx. 100 pp., G & H W-134.Specifications for Water Supply Improvements, Sludge Disposal, Park Forest, Illinois,1966-11239
Scope and Contents
Volume II. "…we have reviewed the works and operations of the District, have made estimates of the future needs for additional facilities, including estimates of cost, and are presenting to you herewith our report (Updated Vol. II) stating our findings and recommendations." Approx. 150 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H S-142.Report on Sewage Works and Sanitation, Metropolitan Sanitary District of Chicago,1966-09240
Scope and Contents
"...this study was undertaken to determine overall construction needs for water pollution control works that will restore water quality to acceptable levels in many reaches of out State's waterways." Approx. 30 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H W-301.Study of Needs for Water Pollution Control Works, Joint Legislative Committee on Water Resources Planning, State of Michigan,1966-12241
Scope and Contents
Vo. V, Part 2. Approx. 40 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H S-142Reports on Sludge Disposal, Calumet Plant, Metropolitan Sanitary District of Chicago,1966-05242
Scope and Contents
Part I - Part IV. Approx. 80 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H S-254. Printed in English and Spanish.Feasibility Study for Sewage Disposal, Instituto Nacional De planificacion, Lima Peru,1966-07243
Scope and Contents
Part IV. Approx. 20 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H S-254. Printed in English and Spanish.Feasibility Study for Sewage Disposal, Instituto Nacional De planificacion, Lima Peru,1966-07244
Scope and Contents
Approx. 25 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H G-40.Report on Additional Refuse Incinerating Capacity, Winnipeg, Manitoba,1966-07245
Scope and Contents
Approx. 150 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H G-294.Report on Refuse Disposal, Kent County, Michigan,1966-10246Report on Water Supply, Lake Forest, Illinois,1967-01247
Scope and Contents
Part III. Contract Documents and Specifications. Approx. 20 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H W-120.Ball Valve Purchase, Water Department, Sioux Falls, South Dakota,1967-03248
Scope and Contents
Approx. 25 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H S-305.Report on Wastewater Treatment, Quaker Oats Company, Pekin, Illinois,1967-05249
Scope and Contents
Approx. 20 pp., text, tables, G & H S-45.Specifications, Air Blower Equipment, Sewage Treatment Works, Madison Metropolitan Sewerage District, Madison, Wisconsin,1967-05250
Scope and Contents
Approx. 200 pp., text (in English and Spanish), tables, figures. G & H W-75.Report on Water Supply, Republic of Panama,1967-05251
Scope and Contents
Approx. 100 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H W-297.Report on Water Supply, Northbrook, Illinois,1967-06252
Scope and Contents
Approx. 50 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H S-115.Project Planning Report for Additional Preliminary Sedimentation Tanks, Water Pollution Control Plant, District of Columbia, Washington, D.C.,1967-08353
Scope and Contents
"This report describes the Bases of Design, the general plans and estimates of construction and of total annual costs of additions to the existing sewage works to provide step aeration throughout." Approx.. 40 pp., text tables, figures. G & H S-188.Report on Additional Sewage and Sludge Facilities to Provide Complete Secondary Treatment by Step Aeration at the Three Existing Philadelphia Sewage Treatment and Sludge Disposal works, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania,1967-08354
Scope and Contents
"The purpose of the report is to determine the inadequacies of the present pipe distribution system and the additions necessary to provide satisfactory capacity." Estimates of construction cost are given and a program for progressive construction outlined. Approx. 20 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H W-139.Report on Water Distribution Systems, Kenilworth, Illinois,1967-09355
Scope and Contents
"This report summarizes the results of our studies to determine the best and most economical method of refuse disposal for the City of Williamsburg and the surrounding area that is or will become urbanized.. It has been assumed, for the purpose of the study, that the present City Limits will remain unchanged." Approx. 25 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H G-313. Two copies.Report on Refuse Disposal, Williamsburg, Virginia,1967-10356
Scope and Contents
Contract documents and Specifications for the facility. Approx. 80 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H S-305.Wastewater Treatment Facilities, Quaker Oats Company, Pekin, Illinois,1967-11357
Scope and Contents
Approx. 60 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H S-235.Specifications and Contract documents, Auxiliary Outlet Sewers, Normal Avenue system, Chicago, Illinois,1967-10358
Scope and Contents
Interim Report No. 1. "…an initial study has been directed towards examining the sewage works needs for the Hudson River communities from Irvington north to Croton-on Hudson. We are pleased to transmit herewith our Interim Report No. 1, which sets forth studies of sewerage works needs for these Hudson River Communities." Approx. 215 pp., text, tables, figures.Comprehensive Sewerage Study, Westchester County, New York,1967-11359
Scope and Contents
"…we have updated and broadened the scope of the May , 1963 "Report on Annexations and Additional Facilities" to take into account a number of changes in circumstances that have occurred since that date. Our findings and recommendations are incorporated in the attached "Report on Sewage Disposal" which is presented herewith." Approx. 150 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H S-13.Report on Sewage Disposal, North Shore Sanitary District, Lake County, Illinois,1967-11360
Scope and Contents
Joint Project with Ralph Stone and Company, Inc., Approx. 100 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H G-302.Solid Waste Survey, San Joaquin, California,1967-11361
Scope and Contents
Approx. 20 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H G-309.Report on Refuse Incinerating Plants, Rochester, New York,1967-07362Report on Sewage Disposal, North Shore Sanitary District, Lake County, Illinois,1968-01363
Scope and Contents
Approx. 100 pp., text, tables, figures.Report on Rate for Sewage Disposal, Richmond, Virginia,1968-01364
Scope and Contents
Approx. 14 pp., text, tables. G & H S-217.Summary of Report on Rates for Sewage Disposal, Richmond, Virginia,1968-01365
Scope and Contents
"The purpose of the investigation and report as authorized was to analyze the existing storm drainage system and to determine the improvements required to eliminate or minimize flooding in both existing sewered and unsewered areas, and to establish a general plant for the Village to follow in making such improvements." Approx. 50 pp., text, tables, figures and maps. G & H S-315.Report on Storm Sewerage, Niles, Illinois,1968-02366
Scope and Contents
Approx. 10 pp., text, figures. G & H S-180.Overflow Structure Housing, Fourth Creek Waste Water Treatment Plant, Knoxville, Tennessee,1968-03367
Scope and Contents
"This report describes the results of studies to determine the additional incinerating capacity required for the estimated refuse quantities in the City of Evanston over the next 25 to 30 years, and to develop preliminary plans and estimates of cost for providing that capacity." Approx. 20 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H G-7.Report on Additional Refuse Incinerating Capacity, Evanston, Illinois,1968-04368
Scope and Contents
"This report presents the findings of an engineering study of flood relief for the lower portion of the Fourmile Run drainage basin. The "problem area" lies between the Potomac River and Shirley Highway, and centers at and somewhat downstream from Alexandria area." Approx. 30 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H S-186.Report on Fourmile Run Flooding. Alexandria, Virginia,1968-04369
Scope and Contents
Approx. 200 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H S-300.Report on Comprehensive Sewerage Study, Erie County (Buffalo), New York,1968-04370
Scope and Contents
Appendices. Approx. 20 pp., test, tables, figures. G & H S-300.Report on Comprehensive Sewerage Study, Erie County (Buffalo), New York,1968-04371
Scope and Contents
Report relates : "An analysis of the effect of the proposed increased sewage flow from the Pabst Brewing Company on the District and Peoria Heights sewer system. Recommended improvements and alternate solutions if such is required including estimated costs, etc. Approx. 15 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H S-51Peoria Heights Intercepting Sewer Capacity Studies, Peoria, Illinois,1968-05372Series II. Published Articles and PamphletsSamuel A. GreeleyDate unknown41Samuel A. GreeleyDate unknown42Paul A. HansenDate unknown43Paul A. HansenDate unknown44G & H Partners in firmDate unknown45Illinois (articles relating to)Date unknown46IllinoisDate unknown47Wisconsin, Minnesota, MissouriDate unknown48Winnipeg, CanadaDate unknown49Great Lakes, Lake Erie, Buffalo, TorontoDate unknown410Washington, D.C.Date unknown411MichiganDate unknown412Boston, MassachusettsDate unknown413IndianaDate unknown414TexasDate unknown415FloridaDate unknown416General ArticlesDate unknown417General ArticlesDate unknown418House Documents, #480, 79th Congress, 2nd Session "Adequate Future Water Supply For District of Columbia and Metropolitan Area"1946419 ======= Link to a copy of the printed finding aid.Series I. Consulting Reports

Specifications and Instructions. Approx. 200 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H file number S-217.Sewage Disposal Project, Gambles Hill Road Pumping Station, Richmond, Virginia,1955-1011

Progress Report No. 2. Compiled with Charles A. Maguire and Elson T. Killam. Approx. 100 pp., text, tables, maps. G & H S-145.Objectives of Sewage Treatment and Facilities Required, Deer Island Sewage Treatment Plant, Boston, Massachusetts,1955-1012

Approx. 40 pp., text, tables.Detailed Studies on Hydraulic Transients and Pump Controls, Deer Island Sewage Treatment Plant,1956-0414Report on Financing the Acquisition, Improvement, and Operation of the Woodlawn Water Company,1960-0715Report on Financing Water Works Improvements, Skokie, Illinois,1963-0416

"This report summarizes the results of our studies to determine the best procedures for improving the operation and increasing the capacity of the existing incinerating plant, and to estimate the effects on refuse collection and disposal costs of combining the collections of combustible and noncombustible refuse." Approx. 10 pp., text, some tables, three figures (floor plans, elevations and sections) not included in the copy. G & H G-259Report on Incinerating Plant, Whitefish Bay, Wisconsin,1963-1218Report on Refuse Disposal, Northeastern Milwaukee County, Wisconsin,1964-0119

Approx. 10 pp., text, and some tables. G & H M-254Project for the Expansion of Water Supply and Sewerage Facilities of Lima, Peru, Corporacion De Saneamiento De Lima,1964-01110

"…we have reviewed the existing refuse collection and disposal practices of the member municipalities in the North Suburban Council on Refuse Disposal, have determined the refuse quantities for which capacity should be provided now and in the future, and have developed alternate projects, including estimates of first and long range refuse disposal problem of the Council area." Communities include Deerfield, Des Plains, Glencoe, Glenview, Golf, Highland Park, Kenilworth, Mt. Prospect, Niles Northbrook, Northfield, Park Ridge, Skokie, Wilmette, Winnetka. Approx. 90 pp., text, tables, Maps. G & H G255.Report on Refuse Disposal, North Suburban Council on Refuse Disposal, Wilmette, Illinois,1964-02111
Scope and Contents
"This manual is a working guide. It sets forth in non-technical language the basic considerations in providing refuse service, the methods available, comparative, costs, sanitary code requirements, procedures to be followed, and offers practical suggestions for planning and carrying out a successful refuse collections and disposal project." Approx. 69 pp., text, tables, figures.Municipal Refuse Collections and Disposal, Office for Local Government, New York State,1964-09112

Approx. 125 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H S-266Report on the Present Charges by Saint Paul for Sewage Disposal, Five Northeast Suburban Communities, Ramsey County, Minnesota,1964-07113

This volume contains the preliminary plans and profiles of the proposed sewers and the preliminary outline plans for the four treatment plants. Approx. 150 pp., plans and figures. G & H S-237.Report on Preliminary Design, Vol. 2 - Plans, Marginal Pollution Control Project, Eastchester Bay, Department of Public Works, New York,1965-02119

Report compiled with Bannister Engineering Co., St. Paul. Approx. 200 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H S-275.Report on Sewerage and Sewerage Treatment, South St. Paul, Minnesota,1965-02120

"The new Lake View Pumping Station, a distribution system pumping station to be located on Wilson Avenue between Claredon Avenue and Marine Drive, will replace the existing Lake View Pumping Station… It will serve the most easterly area of the North Zone of the Chicago Water System." Approx. 180 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H W-235.Report on Design, Lake View Pumping Station, Department of Public Works, Chicago,1965-03121

Notice to Bidders, Instructions to Bidders, …Specifications. Approx. 250 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H W-244.Sewage Treatment Plant Additions, Sanitary District of Rockford, Rockford, Illinois,1966-08234
Scope and Contents
Specifications and instructions. Approx. 50 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H S-215.Sanitary Sewer Improvements, Glenview, Illinois,1966-07235
Scope and Contents
Prepared with Harza Engineers. "The water resources of the Western Region of New York State have been inventoried in this reconnaissance. Water needs and opportunities for development were identified and projected by decades to the year 2020. The cost of development of potential facilities were estimated and alternative ways of combining the facilities to meet the projected requirements were investigated." Approx.. 150 pp., text, tables, figures.Reconnaissance of Water Resources Potentials for Western New York Area, New York State Water Resources Commission,1966-08236
Scope and Contents
Prepared with Harza Engineers, Chicago. Report includes Appendices A-G. Approx. 250 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H W-244.Reconnaissance of Water Resources Potentials for West New York, New York State Water Resources Commission,1966-08237
Scope and Contents
Prepared with Harza Engineers, Chicago. Report includes Appendices H-Q. Approx. 150 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H W-244.Reconnaissance of Water Resources Potentials for Western New York Area, New York Water Resources Commission,1966-08238
Scope and Contents
The report presents the general provisions and detail specifications for the plant in Park Forest. Approx. 100 pp., G & H W-134.Specifications for Water Supply Improvements, Sludge Disposal, Park Forest, Illinois,1966-11239
Scope and Contents
Volume II. "…we have reviewed the works and operations of the District, have made estimates of the future needs for additional facilities, including estimates of cost, and are presenting to you herewith our report (Updated Vol. II) stating our findings and recommendations." Approx. 150 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H S-142.Report on Sewage Works and Sanitation, Metropolitan Sanitary District of Chicago,1966-09240

Approx.. 40 pp., text tables, figures. G & H S-188.Report on Additional Sewage and Sludge Facilities to Provide Complete Secondary Treatment by Step Aeration at the Three Existing Philadelphia Sewage Treatment and Sludge Disposal works, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania,1967-08354
Scope and Contents
"The purpose of the report is to determine the inadequacies of the present pipe distribution system and the additions necessary to provide satisfactory capacity." Estimates of construction cost are given and a program for progressive construction outlined. Approx. 20 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H W-139.Report on Water Distribution Systems, Kenilworth, Illinois,1967-09355
Scope and Contents
"This report summarizes the results of our studies to determine the best and most economical method of refuse disposal for the City of Williamsburg and the surrounding area that is or will become urbanized.. It has been assumed, for the purpose of the study, that the present City Limits will remain unchanged." Approx. 25 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H G-313. Two copies.Report on Refuse Disposal, Williamsburg, Virginia,1967-10356

Contract documents and Specifications for the facility. Approx. 80 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H S-305.Wastewater Treatment Facilities, Quaker Oats Company, Pekin, Illinois,1967-11357

Interim Report No. 1. "…an initial study has been directed towards examining the sewage works needs for the Hudson River communities from Irvington north to Croton-on Hudson. We are pleased to transmit herewith our Interim Report No. 1, which sets forth studies of sewerage works needs for these Hudson River Communities." Approx. 215 pp., text, tables, figures.Comprehensive Sewerage Study, Westchester County, New York,1967-11359

"…we have updated and broadened the scope of the May , 1963 "Report on Annexations and Additional Facilities" to take into account a number of changes in circumstances that have occurred since that date. "The purpose of the investigation and report as authorized was to analyze the existing storm drainage system and to determine the improvements required to eliminate or minimize flooding in both existing sewered and unsewered areas, and to establish a general plant for the Village to follow in making such improvements." Approx. 50 pp., text, tables, figures and maps. G & H S-315.Report on Storm Sewerage, Niles, Illinois,1968-02366

Approx. 10 pp., text, figures. G & H S-180.Overflow Structure Housing, Fourth Creek Waste Water Treatment Plant, Knoxville, Tennessee,1968-03367
Scope and Contents
"This report describes the results of studies to determine the additional incinerating capacity required for the estimated refuse quantities in the City of Evanston over the next 25 to 30 years, and to develop preliminary plans and estimates of cost for providing that capacity." Approx. 20 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H G-7.Report on Additional Refuse Incinerating Capacity, Evanston, Illinois,1968-04368
Scope and Contents
"This report presents the findings of an engineering study of flood relief for the lower portion of the Fourmile Run drainage basin. The "problem area" lies between the Potomac River and Shirley Highway, and centers at and somewhat downstream from Alexandria area." Approx. 30 pp., text, tables, figures. G & H S-186.Report on Fourmile Run Flooding. Alexandria, Virginia,1968-04369
